output.code:
# Load raw text
path = '/mnt/data/file-7qrkKfwVPcS2PbCsb9W1JX-text_to_analyse.txt'
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    raw = f.read()
print("Raw repr:\n", repr(raw[:200]))
print("Length:", len(raw))
print("Sample substring:\n", raw)

# compute spans
span_texts = [
    ("Aya", "إِنَّ اللَّهَ يَأْمُرُكُمْ أَنْ تُؤَدُّوا الْأَمَانَاتِ إِلَى أَهْلِهَا"),
    ("Aya", "يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا اتَّقُوا اللَّهَ وَقُولُوا قَوْلًا سَدِيدًا"),
    ("Aya", "وَأَوْفُوا الْكَيْلَ إِذَا كِلْتُمْ وَزِنُوا بِالْقِسْطَاسِ الْمُسْتَقِيمِ ذَٰلِكَ خَيْرٌ وَأَحْسَنُ تَأْوِيلًا"),
    ("Hadeeth", "آية المنافق ثلاث: إذا حدث كذب، وإذا وعد أخلف، وإذا اؤتمن خان"),
]
citations = []
for ctype, text in span_texts:
    # find all occurrences
    start = 0
    found = False
    while True:
        idx = raw.find(text, start)
        if idx == -1:
            break
        found = True
        citations.append((idx, idx+len(text), text, ctype))
        start = idx + len(text)
    print(f"{ctype} '{text}' found: {found}")
# print citations
print(citations)

# check char before first start
print(repr(raw[187:190]))
